code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n_len = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut p = 0
mut neg = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i <= n_len
  let b = if i == n_len
    32
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      let v = sign * cur
      if v > 0
        p = p + v
      else if v < 0
        neg = neg + v
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let r = p - neg
println("r=#{r}")
